mapper.sql: id, own_name, consignee, phone, province, city, district, address_detail, is_default
mapper.insert: insert into tb_address (own_name, consignee, phone, province, city, district, address_detail, is_default) values (#{ownName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{consignee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select:
select
from tb_address where own_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by is_default desc
mapper.update: update tb_address set is_default = 0 where own_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
